title: Sudden Cardiac Arrest
description: An elderly man collapsed on the living room floor and is not breathing.
initial_variations: Please, you have to help! My {victim_relation}, {caller_name}, just collapsed! He's not moving, and I hear {ambient_audio}!
I need an ambulance right away to {address_location}! My {victim_relation} fell down. He's completely blue and there is {ambient_audio} in the room!
Oh my God, {caller_name} is on the floor! He's not responding to me, and there's a loud {ambient_audio} in the background. What do I do?!

specific_details: pale skin and cold to the touch

variations: We are at {address_location}! Please tell me they are on their way!
I'm at {address_location}. Please, hurry!
The address is {address_location}. It's the yellow brick house!
He was standing up, complained of chest pain, and then just fell flat on his back. He's {specific_details}.
We were just talking, and he suddenly gasped, clutched his chest, and collapsed. He's {specific_details}.
I found him on the floor like this. I think he's {specific_details}. He's not waking up!
No, he's not breathing at all! His chest isn't moving!
He's making a weird, occasional gasping sound, but he's not really breathing!
I don't think he is. I put my ear to his mouth and there's nothing!
I'm trying, but I'm so scared! Just tell me what to do!
Okay, okay. I'm taking a breath. Please tell me the ambulance is coming.
I will try. I just want him to be okay!
Okay, I'm kneeling next to him. Tell me how to do CPR!
I know CPR, I'm starting chest compressions now! One, two, three, four...
I've placed him on his back on the hard floor. I'm ready to push on his chest!

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Excellent dispatch. Paramedics arrived within 5 minutes, took over CPR, and successfully defibrillated {caller_name}, restoring a normal heart rhythm.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived first and began CPR, but the delay in medical dispatch meant paramedics arrived later, reducing {caller_name}'s chances of a full recovery.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrived quickly with an AED and started resuscitation. However, they lacked advanced life support transport, requiring a secondary ambulance call.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: You dispatched Animal Control to a cardiac arrest. {caller_name} received no medical attention and passed away before proper services were routed.

DISMISS.message: You dismissed a critical cardiac arrest call as a non-emergency. The patient died, resulting in a fatal outcome, negligence charges, and immediate termination.

title: Silent Cry for Help
description: A caller pretending to order a pepperoni pizza to hide that she is in danger from an intruder.
initial_variations: Hi, yes, I'd like to order a large pepperoni pizza for delivery to {address_location}, please. Yes, and {ambient_audio}.
Can I get a delivery order? I'm at {address_location}. Make it a half pepperoni, half sausage, and please hurry because {ambient_audio}.
Hello, pizza delivery? Yes, I need one large pizza sent to {address_location}. My {victim_relation} is waiting, and there is {ambient_audio}.

ambient_audio: a man shouting angrily in the background
someone slamming doors in another room
specific_details: he is refusing to let me leave
he's breaking glass in the hallway

variations: Yes, that's {address_location}. Please don't forget the apartment number!
I'm at {address_location}. Yes, please deliver it as fast as you can.
Delivery to {address_location}, yes, that's correct.
No, I can't talk about toppings. I just need it delivered. Is the driver leaving now?
He's right in the next room, yes. He likes pepperoni. How long will it take?
I'm ordering because I'm hungry. Yes, it's very important. Please hurry.
Yes, he has a... a very sharp utensil. A knife for slicing, yes.
I think he has a pocket knife, yes, in his hand.
He might. He's very angry. Please just send the delivery.
I'm trying to stay calm. I'm just waiting for the delivery driver.
Okay. I'll stay on the line. Just let me know when they are close.
Yes, I understand. I'm staying right here.
Yes, I'm staying in the kitchen. I'll keep the door locked if I can.
I'm staying in the bedroom. I won't move until they knock.
Okay, I am locked in the bathroom. I will stay here.

SEND_POLICE.message: Superb dispatch. You correctly decoded the emergency. Officers arrived with sirens off, made contact, and arrested {caller_name}'s violent {victim_relation} who was armed and holding her hostage.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: You sent paramedics to a hostile domestic scene. They had to stage nearby waiting for police, delaying response while {caller_name}'s safety was compromised.

SEND_FIRE.message: Dispatching the fire department to a hostile hostage situation was inappropriate. Firefighters could not enter, and the delay in police dispatch resulted in injuries.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: You sent Animal Control to a violent domestic crisis. The dispatcher failed to recognize the code, leading to a tragic outcome for the caller.

DISMISS.message: You dismissed a coded domestic abuse call as a prank pizza order. The intruder assaulted the caller, leading to severe injuries and criminal charges against you.

title: The Cold Nugget Crisis
description: An irate caller demanding police arrest a drive-thru cashier for serving cold chicken nuggets.
initial_variations: I need a police cruiser sent to the drive-thru at {address_location} right now! They gave me cold nuggets and the cashier, {caller_name}, is refusing to refund me, and there is {ambient_audio}!
I want to file a report! I'm at the fast-food place at {address_location}. My {victim_relation} bought these nuggets and they are ice cold! I hear {ambient_audio} from the kitchen!
Get police down here! I paid good money, and {caller_name} served me raw, cold nuggets! I can hear {ambient_audio} from the staff laughing at me!

specific_details: demanding a free meal and gas money

variations: I already told you, the fast-food place on {address_location}! Are you sending them or what?
It's the one at {address_location}! I'm parked right in the drive-thru!
We are at {address_location}. Check your GPS!
They gave me cold nuggets, and when I asked for a fresh batch, they rolled their eyes! I'm {specific_details}!
The food is cold and the service is terrible! I'm {specific_details} and I want justice!
They are refusing a refund! I am {specific_details} and I won't move until the cops get here!
Don't tell me to calm down! I am a paying citizen!
I am calm! I just want what I paid for!
I will not calm down. This is theft! I am calling my lawyer!
Fine, I'm staying right here blocking the lane until a cruiser arrives!
I'm not moving my car. I will sit here all night!
Yeah, I'm waiting. But you better hurry.

DISMISS.message: Correct response. You refused to dispatch emergency services for a civil customer dispute, warning the caller about misuse of 911 and freeing up lines.

SEND_POLICE.message: You wasted police resources by dispatching officers to a customer dispute over cold nuggets. The caller was ticketed for blocking traffic, and you were reprimanded.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: You dispatched an ambulance to a fast-food drive-thru for cold nuggets. EMS was furious at the waste of emergency medical resources.

SEND_FIRE.message: You dispatched a fire engine to a drive-thru for cold food. Firefighters arrived, verified there was no fire, and reported the waste of city resources.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: You dispatched Animal Control to a chicken nugget dispute. A useless and embarrassing waste of animal services.
